name: Sangfor Technologies Inc.
summary: Sangfor Technologies Inc. provides IT infrastructure solutions in China and internationally. The company specializes in the provision of cloud computing, and network security and optimization solutions. It offers network security products, including Internet access management products; NGAF firewall platform; and SSL VPN products that provide support for remote user to access the enterprise network. The company also offers SD-WAN optimization solutions, including hardware and virtual software products for the Internet, internal WANs, public and private clouds, and hybrid networks. In addition, it provides virtual desktop infrastructure products; EasyConnect, a remote access solution, which allows the access to Windows desktops and applications; application delivery solutions for service systems; hyper-converged infrastructure solutions; and aBOS, a NFV converged gateway solution. The company serves finance and banking industry, governments, Internet service providers, schools and universities, and enterprises. Sangfor Technologies Inc. was founded in 2000 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
